system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.baocao_quyettoan_nguyenlieu_hangtrang2","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[BAOCAO_QUYETTOAN_NGUYENLIEU_HANGTRANG2](@dondathang NVARCHAR(200))
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.nguyenlieu, SUM(A.sokhoi) AS sokhoi_dauvao
	INTO #PHOI_DAUVAO
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi A
	WHERE A.madonhang = @dondathang
	GROUP BY A.madonhang, A.nguyenlieu

	SELECT A.donhang, A.nguyenlieu, SUM(A.sokhoi) AS sokhoi_baorong
	INTO #PHOI_BAORONG
	FROM (
	SELECT A.donhang,
		nguyenlieu = CASE
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'THÔNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'THÔNG'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'CAO SU', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'CAO SU'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'DẺ GAI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'DẺ GAI'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'SỒI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'SỒI'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'TRÀM', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'TRÀM'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'HỒ ĐÀO', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'HỒ ĐÀO'
						WHEN CHARINDEX(N'BẠCH DƯƠNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'BẠCH DƯƠNG'
						ELSE B.nguyenlieu
					 END, A.sokhoi
	FROM dqt_pallet_chitiet A
		INNER JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva B ON A.id_nguyenlieu = B.id
	WHERE A.donhang = @dondathang AND A.phanloai NOT IN (N'Sản xuất') --AND congdoan = 'DP01'
	) A GROUP BY A.donhang, A.nguyenlieu

	SELECT donhang, nguyenlieu, SUM(sokhoi) AS sokhoi 
	INTO #PHOI_TAICHE
	FROM (
		SELECT A.donhang, 
			nguyenlieu = CASE
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'THÔNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'THÔNG'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'CAO SU', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'CAO SU'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'DẺ GAI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'DẺ GAI'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'SỒI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'SỒI'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'TRÀM', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'TRÀM'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'HỒ ĐÀO', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'HỒ ĐÀO'
							WHEN CHARINDEX(N'BẠCH DƯƠNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'BẠCH DƯƠNG'
							ELSE B.nguyenlieu
						END, (A.dayy*A.rong*A.dai*A.soluong)/1000000000 AS sokhoi
		FROM tr_baocao_hangloi A
			INNER JOIN tr_pallet B ON A.pallet_id = B.id
		WHERE A.donhang = @dondathang AND A.huongxuly = N'Ra phôi mới'
	) A
	GROUP BY donhang, nguyenlieu

	SELECT A.nguyenlieu, A.malo_nguyenlieu, B.fsc_name
	INTO #THONGKE_PHOI
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi A WITH(NOLOCK)
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.fsc_id = B.fsc_id
	WHERE A.madonhang = @dondathang
	GROUP BY A.nguyenlieu, A.malo_nguyenlieu, B.fsc_name

	SELECT nguyenlieu, STRING_AGG(malo_nguyenlieu, ',  ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY malo_nguyenlieu) AS  malo_nguyenlieu
	INTO #DONHANG_MALO
	FROM #THONGKE_PHOI
	GROUP BY nguyenlieu

	SELECT nguyenlieu, STRING_AGG(fsc_name, ',  ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fsc_name) AS fsc_name
	INTO #DONHANG_FSC
	FROM (
		SELECT nguyenlieu, fsc_name
		FROM #THONGKE_PHOI
		GROUP BY nguyenlieu, fsc_name
	) A GROUP BY nguyenlieu


	SELECT A.madonhang, A.nguyenlieu, ML.malo_nguyenlieu, FSC.fsc_name, A.sokhoi_dauvao, B.sokhoi_baorong, C.sokhoi AS sokhoi_taiche
	FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO A
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_MALO ML ON A.nguyenlieu = ML.nguyenlieu
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_FSC FSC ON A.nguyenlieu = FSC.nguyenlieu
		LEFT JOIN #PHOI_BAORONG B ON A.nguyenlieu = B.nguyenlieu
		LEFT JOIN #PHOI_TAICHE C ON A.nguyenlieu = C.nguyenlieu
	ORDER BY A.madonhang, A.nguyenlieu

	DROP TABLE #PHOI_DAUVAO, #PHOI_BAORONG, #THONGKE_PHOI, #DONHANG_MALO, #DONHANG_FSC;
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.tr_baocao_hangloi","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
